title: From Pixels to States: Rethinking Interactive World Models as Game Engines
innovation_summary: From Pixels to States: Rethinking Interactive World Models as Game Engines: Complementing this analysis, we present a scalable data engine for Black Myth: Wukong that collects over 90 hours of gameplay with frame-aligned player actions, ground-truth game.
